What do people mean when they say a unit is "core" on their team?
it means that the team's main strength is playing around that character's mechanics
basically the 'core' character provides the damage source for the team (damage/poison/retaliate)

teams are usually 1 core + 2 supports + 1 defence unit but in this definition support just means somebody that helps the core do damage so characters like tulu and goliath can be considered support for sorel blue even though they're considered attacking units in-game
